overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban downtown. The character traverses orange tactile paving sidewalks, crosses a wide intersection beneath a colorful LED overpass, and continues along a commercial street lined with digital billboards, storefronts, and scattered pedestrians in clear morning sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with orange tactile paving

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange textured sidewalk toward the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: bright orange textured paving tiles covering the pedestrian walkway
tall smooth white concrete wall running along the right side of the path
futuristic building facade with horizontal strips of multicolored LED lights in green, yellow, and red
tall yellow street pole with attached traffic signals and signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady walk along a futuristic city sidewalk paved with bright orange tactile tiles. A tall white concrete wall runs along the right side while ahead, a building facade adorned with vibrant horizontal LED light strips dominates the view. A lone pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction as the camera approaches the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection beneath colorful LED overpass

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and onto the yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the wide intersection
overhead LED light strips shift from green-yellow-red patterns to purple-pink hues

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection on the yellow-striped crosswalk, moving under the colorful LED overpass structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes on dark asphalt
large cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overhead roadway structure
elevated highway or walkway casting shadows over the intersection
tropical palm trees visible in the distance beyond the intersection
large electronic billboard displaying colorful animated graphics

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the sidewalk onto a wide yellow-striped crosswalk, moving beneath a massive overhead structure adorned with vibrant multicolored LED strips. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural sunlight and colored artificial light as the camera passes under the overpass. A futuristic vehicle drives past on the left while digital billboards become visible on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and digital signage

events.description: passing a parked police cruiser with officers standing nearby on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk past various commercial establishments, vending machines, and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: police officer standing next to the parked police cruiser
woman in casual clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: standard gray concrete pedestrian walkway with visible seams and texture
large elevated digital screen mounted on a tall structure displaying animated advertisements
futuristic police vehicle with glowing blue accents parked on the sidewalk
automated kiosks including a green food vendor and red emergency equipment station
row of shops with signage including a red neon sign reading AMERICAN BOOZE
wooden and metal public seating along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with commercial buildings. Large holographic billboards and digital signage dominate the left side while storefronts, vending machines, and a parked police cruiser line the right. The colorful LED structure from the intersection remains visible in the distance to the left as the camera passes various pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban corridor that transitions from a narrow sidewalk into a wide, neon-lit intersection and finally along a commercial street. It begins with a steady walk along bright orange tactile tiles beside a white concrete wall, moving toward a building facade adorned with vibrant horizontal LED strips. As the camera reaches the intersection, the scene shifts onto a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath a massive overhead structure of multicolored LEDs, where natural sunlight blends with artificial glows as a futuristic vehicle drives past. The perspective then expands across the street and onto a concrete sidewalk lined with holographic billboards and digital signage on the left. Finally, the camera passes vending machines and a parked police cruiser while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, leaving the colorful LED overpass visible in the distance.
